caveat: This artifact proves live deployment execution readiness contracts, approval gates, credential binding rules, provider adapter coverage, smoke-test planning, rollback planning, and audit preparation. It does not prove that any live deployment was executed. Live execution remains blocked by default and requires explicit user approval plus user-supplied credentials.
